brand-story-img.query: Velmora was born from a simple belief: that the jewelry you wear every day should feel as special as the pieces you save for occasions. We craft demi-fine jewelry in 18K gold plate — designed to move with you, layer effortlessly, and become a part of your story. No compromises on quality, no intimidating price tags. Just beautiful, enduring pieces made for real life. Jewelry That Lives With You
